lemon_market_new_listings.description: Good condition.
This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant damage and the interior is heavily worn. It has mechanical issues and requires major repairs to be fully functional.

Get ready to hit the road in this fantastic find! This car is in good condition and has been well-maintained, offering a smooth and dependable driving experience you'll love. While it shows a bit of light, honest wear consistent with its age, it remains a reliable and stylish choice that's ready for its next owner.

The vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage and visible rust. The interior shows heavy wear, including tears in the upholstery and stains. The engine and transmission require mechanical repair.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic attention. There is visible rust on the body panels and frame, and the engine struggles to stay running consistently. The interior is heavily worn with multiple tears in the seating. It is being sold as-is, ideally for parts or as a major project for someone with the tools and time to rebuild it.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require extensive mechanical and cosmetic restoration to be roadworthy. The exterior shows its age with several large dents, significant rust along the rocker panels and wheel wells, and a clear coat that is peeling across the hood and roof. Inside, the upholstery is heavily worn with multiple tears in the driver’s seat and noticeable staining on the carpets. Mechanically, the engine runs roughly and the transmission exhibits hesitation when shifting. It currently needs a new battery and likely a full brake overhaul. This is being sold as-is, ideal for a mechanic looking for a project or for use as a parts donor.

This distinguished vehicle represents a superior balance of performance and value. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a refined driving experience supported by rigorous mechanical standards. An exceptional opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking proven reliability and a sophisticated aesthetic.

Hey there! Thanks so much for stopping by to check out my car. This beauty has been such a reliable ride for me, and I’m honestly going to miss it! It’s in really solid shape—it's been well-loved, kept clean, and is totally ready for its next big adventure. Everything runs just like it should, making it the perfect choice if you're looking for something dependable and fun to drive. Feel free to reach out if you have any questions at all—I'd love to chat and get you behind the wheel!

This 996.2 Carrera features the refined 3.6L flat-six, delivering linear power delivery across the rev range. The M96 powerplant has been meticulously maintained, including a proactive IMS bearing retrofit and a recently replaced water pump to ensure cooling system integrity. The 6-speed manual gearbox offers crisp engagement with a short-throw shifter, paired with a chassis that retains its factory-spec torsional rigidity. Suspension
Used car in good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Reliable daily driver.

Up for sale is a meticulously maintained vehicle that strikes the perfect balance between luxury and reliability. The exterior features a deep, glossy finish with only minor road peppering consistent with careful highway use. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary; the leather upholstery is supple and free of tears, and all electronic features—from the dual-zone climate control to the premium sound system—function exactly as they should. Mechanically, this car is turn-key ready. It has benefited from a consistent maintenance schedule, including a recent oil service and a multi-point inspection that confirmed the brakes and tires have plenty of life remaining. The engine pulls smoothly, and the transmission shifts with precision, offering a driving experience that is both comfortable and engaging. This is a solid, honest car that has been cared for by an owner who values longevity. It comes with a complete set of floor mats, two keys, and a clean title in hand.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents an exceptional balance of refined performance and enduring reliability. Having undergone a comprehensive professional inspection, it remains in commendable mechanical and aesthetic condition, ensuring a sophisticated driving experience. A premier selection for the discerning client seeking a dependable, high-caliber automobile at a competitive valuation.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this unit delivers an exceptional balance of performance and long-term value. Fully inspected and prepared for immediate delivery, it stands as a testament to responsible ownership and enduring engineering.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for me. Whether you're commuting or heading out on a road trip, this car is ready to hit the road with you! It’s been well-cared for and is just waiting for its next adventure. Come take it for a spin!

Used car. Good condition. Clean title. Routine maintenance performed. Reliable performance.

This meticulously maintained luxury sedan offers a refined driving experience and stands in impressive condition. The metallic charcoal exterior retains a deep, glossy luster, with only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with careful use. Inside, the heated leather seats are supple and free of tears, while the cabin remains smoke-free and quiet. All power features, including the panoramic sunroof and the premium sound system, are fully operational. Mechanically, the vehicle is robust; it has been serviced regularly at the dealership, featuring a smooth-shifting transmission and a responsive engine. With a clean title and recent brake service, this car provides a perfect blend of reliability and sophistication for its next owner.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies both reliability and sophistication. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. The powertrain delivers consistent, robust performance, while the cabin offers a well-preserved environment conducive to a premium driving experience. An ideal acquisition for those seeking a dependable vehicle without compromising on distinction.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive excellence, this vehicle has been maintained to rigorous standards and demonstrates remarkable mechanical integrity. It offers a refined driving experience and remains in commendable condition, representing a superior value for the discerning motorist who prioritizes both reliability and performance.

Hey there! I’m selling my trusty ride and it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for me. It’s clean, runs great, and is totally ready for its next adventure! I’ve taken good care of it over the years, so it’s got plenty of life left. Come take it for a spin—you’re going to love how it handles!

Vehicle in good condition. Clean interior. Recent maintenance performed. Reliable performance. Title in hand.

Offering a meticulously cared-for vehicle that strikes the perfect balance between daily utility and refined performance. The exterior boasts a vibrant finish with only the light, honest character marks consistent with careful use and attentive ownership. Inside, you’ll find a pristine, smoke-free cabin featuring supportive seating with no significant wear, a clear dashboard, and a fully functional suite of premium electronics. Mechanically, this car is exceptionally sound; it has been serviced religiously according to the manufacturer's schedule, resulting in a smooth, responsive drive and a quiet engine that inspires total confidence on the highway. From the crisp climate control to the tight, predictable suspension, every detail has been thoroughly inspected. This is a reliable, attractive vehicle that is ready to be driven home today without any immediate maintenance needs.

Presented in exemplary condition, this vehicle offers a harmonious blend of performance and sophisticated engineering. Meticulously maintained and rigorously inspected, it stands as a testament to quality craftsmanship and enduring reliability. A premier selection for the professional seeking a refined driving experience.

Presenting a meticulously maintained specimen that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This vehicle has undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and reliability. Offering a balanced synthesis of luxury and proven durability, it stands as a premier choice for the discerning driver seeking quality without compromise.

Hey there! I'm selling my reliable ride, and it's been such a joy to drive. It's in really nice shape and has been well-loved, perfect for someone looking for a dependable car that still looks great on the road. It runs smoothly and is ready for its next adventure with you! Feel free to reach out if you have any questions—I'd love to see it go to a good home!

Well-maintained vehicle. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear. Engine runs well. Service records available. Title in hand.

This well-maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and reliability, offering a premium driving experience at a competitive value. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish, complemented by clean alloy wheels and only minor cosmetic signs of use consistent with a carefully driven car. Inside, the smoke-free cabin features supple leather upholstery that remains firm and comfortable, alongside a fully functional suite of modern electronics and climate control. Mechanically, the car is in strong form; it has been serviced at regular intervals, ensuring the engine runs quietly and the transmission shifts seamlessly. Recent maintenance includes a fresh oil change and a comprehensive multi-point inspection. This is a dependable, turn-key vehicle ready for its next owner to enjoy for years to come. Includes two sets of keys and all original service records.

This exceptional vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning motorist. Meticulously maintained and presenting in superior condition, it offers a harmonious blend of performance and sophistication. Every mechanical component has undergone rigorous inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for reliability and roadworthiness. The exterior retains its original luster, complemented by a refined interior that reflects a history of attentive care. We invite you to experience the caliber of this automobile firsthand.
